caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Choppy Seas around Grenada Today
caribbean.paragraph: Grenada is experiencing east-southeast winds near 14 kt, seas to 4.5 ft with an ESE swell period of 6 s, and periods of heavy rain with 88% rain probability. Martinique is seeing similar conditions with 13 kt winds, and I advise mariners and port operators to expect choppy approaches, reduced visibility in downpours, and ponding on low-lying docks.

mediterranean.headline: SSE Winds Prompt Small Craft Caution in Cadiz
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing south-southeast winds to 22 kt with 5.2 ft seas and a 12 s SSE swell and less than 10% rain probability. I recommend Small Craft Advisory precautions for small vessels in Cadiz, and operators bound for Mykonos should expect winds up to 24 kt.
